projectDetails: A modern event management platform designed to help users discover, explore, and manage events in real time. The application features secure user authentication, protected event details pages, and an intuitive interface for browsing upcoming events. With responsive design, instant notifications, and private route protection, the platform provides a seamless and engaging user experience.
features: User Authentication: Secure registration and login system for accessing platform features.
Private Routes: Protected event details pages accessible only to authenticated users.
Real-Time Event Information: Users can browse and view up-to-date event details.
Toast Notifications: Instant feedback for successful login, registration, and user actions.
Responsive Design: Optimized experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

projectDetails: A responsive web application designed to provide quick and easy access to essential emergency contact services across Bangladesh. The platform helps users find, copy, and call important hotline numbers during urgent situations. With a clean user interface, call history tracking, favorite services management, and mobile-friendly design, the application ensures a smooth and efficient user experience when every second matters.
features: Responsive design optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
One-click Call and Copy functionality for emergency hotline numbers.
Interactive emergency service cards with hover effects and detailed information.
Call history tracking with timestamp display for recent activities.
Favorite option to save frequently used emergency services for quick access.

projectDetails: A responsive flower shop website designed to provide an elegant and user-friendly online shopping experience. The project focuses on modern UI design, seamless navigation, and device compatibility across mobile, tablet, and desktop screens. Users can browse flower collections, explore featured products, and interact with intuitive forms, creating a smooth and engaging experience.
features: Fully responsive design optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
Modern and visually appealing user interface for showcasing flower products.
Easy-to-use navigation system for smooth browsing experience.
Interactive forms for user engagement and inquiries.
Clean layout with organized product sections and promotional content.

projectDetails: A modern and responsive e-commerce landing page designed for influencers and content creators to showcase popular products. The website features an attractive hero section, product collection showcase, featured product highlights, and a user-friendly interface optimized for all devices. The project focuses on responsive design, clean layouts, and an engaging shopping experience.
features: Fully responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
Modern hero section with call-to-action buttons and promotional content.
Popular product collection displayed in an organized card-based layout.
Featured products section to highlight premium and trending items.
Clean navigation menu with smooth user experience and accessibility.

projectDetails: A modern and fully responsive architecture company website designed to showcase architectural services, team expertise, and project achievements. The website provides a clean and professional user interface with responsive layouts, interactive sections, and seamless navigation. Built with a mobile-first approach, the platform ensures an optimal viewing experience across smartphones, tablets, and desktop devices.
features: Fully responsive design optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.
Modern navigation menu for smooth and intuitive user experience.
Responsive grid layouts for displaying team members, projects, and services.
Professional architecture-focused user interface with clean design principles.
Optimized content sections showcasing company achievements, features, and project statistics.
